coverage_event: Pr[ forall B in B(S), forall a: dR_a(B) <= g_a(phi_a(B)) + q ] >= 1-alpha; B(S) = fixed finite batching protocol; NOT an unbounded future stream; stratified by DISEASE TASK FAMILY (PD vs SCZ) only, NEVER by the HC/Patient label y; exchangeability claimed w.r.t. disease-stratified CAL subjects only; calibration unit = subject cluster; m = per-fold CAL subjects; LOCO = empirical.
